MAP_CHANGED_INVALID.title: Invalid Map Change
MAP_CHANGED_INVALID.description: The character entered a map that is not allowed by the competition rules.

MOUNT_CHANGED.title: Mount Usage Detected
MOUNT_CHANGED.description: The character has mounted, which is not allowed under the competition rules.

HEALING_USED.title: Healing Skill Used
HEALING_USED.description: The character used a healing skill, which is forbidden by the competition rules.

BUFF_FORBIDDEN_FOOD.title: Forbidden Food
BUFF_FORBIDDEN_FOOD.description: The character consumed Nourishment (Food), which is forbidden by the competition rules.

BUFF_FORBIDDEN_ENHANCEMENT.title: Forbidden Enhancement
BUFF_FORBIDDEN_ENHANCEMENT.description: The character consumed an Enhancement item, which is forbidden by the competition rules.

BUFF_FORBIDDEN_REINFORCED.title: Reinforced Armor
BUFF_FORBIDDEN_REINFORCED.description: The character gained Reinforced Armor, which is forbidden by the competition rules.

BUILD_FORBIDDEN_TRAIT.title: Forbidden Trait Detected
BUILD_FORBIDDEN_TRAIT.description: The character selected a trait that is explicitly forbidden by the competition rules.

BUILD_FORBIDDEN_SKILL.title: Forbidden Skill Detected
BUILD_FORBIDDEN_SKILL.description: The character equipped or used a skill that is forbidden by the competition rules.

EQUIPMENT_INVALID.title: Forbidden Equipment Detected
EQUIPMENT_INVALID.description: The character equipped an item that is not allowed by the competition rules.

GROUP.title: Group Detected
GROUP.description: The character is or was part of a group, which is not permitted under the competition rules.

DEAD.title: Character Death
DEAD.description: The character has died. Death results in immediate disqualification.
